ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image */,
  "image_labels" TEXT /* Labels associated with the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for image creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for image update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for category creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for category update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ai_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AI model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the AI model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the AI model (e.g., CNN, LSTM) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the AI model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version number of the AI model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for model creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for model update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guesses" (
  "guess_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guess */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the guess was made for */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AI model that made the guess */,
  "guess" TEXT /* Guess made by the AI model */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the guess */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for guess creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for guess update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guess_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guesses_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guesses_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ai_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "guess_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guess the reward was given for */,
  "reward_value" INTEGER /* Value of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for reward creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for reward update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_guess_id FOREIGN KEY ("guess_id") REFERENCES guesses ("guess_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corrections" (
  "correction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correction */,
  "guess_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guess the correction was given for */,
  "correction_value" INTEGER /* Value of the correction */,
  "correction_type" TEXT /* Type of correction (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for correction creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for correction update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrections_guess_id FOREIGN KEY ("guess_id") REFERENCES guesses ("guess_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "guess_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guess the reaction was given for */,
  "reaction" TEXT /* User feedback on the guess */,
  "reaction_type" TEXT /* Type of reaction (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for reaction creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for reaction update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reactions_guess_id FOREIGN KEY ("guess_id") REFERENCES guesses ("guess_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AI model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the AI model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for version creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for version update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ai_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the change was made to */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for change creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for change update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AI model the analytic belongs to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for analytic creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for analytic update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ai_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the platform */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for feedback creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for feedback update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AI model the usage belongs to */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the model was used */,
  "num_requests" INTEGER /* Number of requests made to the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for usage creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for usage update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_usage_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ai_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the usage belongs to */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was used */,
  "num_requests" INTEGER /* Number of requests made to the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for usage creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for usage update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AI model the performance belongs to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for performance creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for performance update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ai_models ("model_id")
)
